idea-plugin.name: String Resource Finder
idea-plugin.description:
String Resource Finder

Fixes Go to Declaration (Cmd+Click / Ctrl+Click) for Android string resource keys that use dots as separators in strings.xml files.

The Problem

In strings.xml, keys use dots:

name="payment_method.add.whitescreen.body"

But in code (Kotlin/Java/XML layouts), they are referenced with underscores:

R.string.payment_method_add_whitescreen_body

So Cmd+Click on a dotted key in strings.xml finds nothing useful.

What This Plugin Does

  • When you Cmd+Click a string name attribute in strings.xml, it converts dots to underscores
  • Single usage found → navigates directly to the usage
  • Multiple usages found → opens the Find in Files search overlay with the correct R.string.* reference pre-filled
  • No usages found → falls back to default Android Studio behavior

Searches In

  • Kotlin and Java files for R.string.<name>
  • XML layout/menu files for @string/<name>
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Cmd+Click on dotted string resource names in strings.xml to find usages
  • Dot-to-underscore conversion for R.string and @string references
  • Single result: direct navigation; multiple results: Find in Files overlay
  • Fallback to default Android Studio behavior when no usages are found
